mapper.select: SELECT c.id, u.id AS other_user_id, u.name AS other_user_name, u.email AS other_user_email, u.headline AS other_user_headline, u.avatar_url AS other_user_avatar_url, u.location AS other_user_location, (SELECT content FROM message m2 WHERE m2.conversation_id = c.id ORDER BY m2.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message_content, (SELECT created_at FROM message m3 WHERE m3.conversation_id = c.id ORDER BY m3.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message m4 WHERE m4.conversation_id = c.id AND m4.sender_id != #{userId} AND m4.read_at IS NULL) AS unread_count FROM conversation c JOIN conversation_participant cp1 ON cp1.conversation_id = c.id AND cp1.user_id = #{userId} JOIN conversation_participant cp2 ON cp2.conversation_id = c.id AND cp2.user_id != #{userId} JOIN `user` u ON u.id = cp2.user_id ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM conversation_participant WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation (created_at, updated_at) VALUES (NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
